title: boechera hastatula
intro: Boechera hastatula, also known as hairy rockcress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, containing compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's leaves and stems have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. Boechera hastatula can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
